parsed.recommendation_text: For fast phone charging, the Anker Nano 67W charger is highly recommended. It offers dual USB-C ports for simultaneous charging and supports GaN technology for compactness and efficiency. Despite warming up under full load, its fast-charging capabilities make it a top choice. The Belkin charger is too small at only 25W, while the Samsung charger lacks multiple ports.
parsed.selection_rationale: Anker Nano 67W offers best balance of speed, compactness, and brand recognition.
